ideation: This sequence mimics the action of someone happily taking a bite of a delicious doughnut.  The animation focuses on the right arm, bringing it up to the mouth and then pulling away, while the left arm remains in a relaxed, slightly anticipatory position.  The movement should be smooth and expressive, conveying enjoyment and satisfaction. In the first frame, both arms start in a relaxed position. The right arm is slightly forward, anticipating the action, while the left arm hangs naturally at the side. In the second frame, the right arm moves upward and slightly inward, bringing the hand towards the mouth. The wrist is slightly bent to simulate grasping the doughnut. The left arm remains in a relaxed position. In the third frame, the right arm is positioned as if taking a bite of the doughnut. The hand is positioned close to the mouth, and the wrist is angled to mimic a bite. The left arm remains relaxed. In the fourth frame, the right arm begins to pull away from the mouth, completing the eating motion. The wrist is slightly bent, as if holding the partially eaten doughnut. In the fifth frame, the right arm returns to a relaxed position, while the left arm remains unchanged.  The overall motion is smooth and expressive, conveying a feeling of contentment and satisfaction.

frames.beat: arms relaxed, anticipating a sweet treat
right arm lifts, hand reaching for the doughnut
taking a delicious bite with a happy smile
pulling away, savoring the sweet flavor
arms return to rest, satisfied and the doughnut is gone
